name: Robustness - Frustrated Caller De-escalation
description: Angry caller; tests empathy and staying on task.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: This is the third time I'm calling about this stupid battery and nobody helps me!
expectedOutcome: Agent acknowledges the frustration, de-escalates without mirroring hostility, and still drives the correct warranty path to completion.
